creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear all:

Currently, e-mail from Bugzilla arrives via bz-noreply@freebsd.org. Multiple people are getting confused, as in the FreeBSD context, 'bz' refers to Bjoern Zeeb, and believing he is sending the e-mail but with an anti-spam variant on his username. Could we change the Bugzilla reply username to bugzilla-noreply, and likewise any other bz- addresses it has?

Thanks!

Robert
